text: string includes the common distribution, e.g. Sequoia, the clang
versions, and the microprocessor instruction set, e.g. i686. Putting them all together provides, for example, a macOS Sequoia package named
All: Intel CPU capable of running the full AVX instruction set.
To install the software, simply double-click on the appropriate DMG file that was downloaded.
We'll now go step by step through the process. First you must login with your forum account and provide the serial number for the license you have purchased.
During installation, you will see the RenderMan 24 License Server instead of the RenderMan 25 License Server.  This is expected.
Because of new security features on macOS, we no longer provide direct downloads of macOS pkg files for our applications. Downloads must be done with the RenderMan Installer on that platform only.
. RenderMan Pro Server 27 binding is compatible with 3.7, 3.9, 3.10, and 3.11.
